purpose: overfit check for the n=15 fine-tune: does the learned recovery generalize to UNSEEN scenes?
metric: selected-traj L1 vs ref_lookahead_rig recovery target (deployment path, steps=2, eval/deterministic)
read: Train recovery-L1 collapses 5.16->0.43 (cls 0.99 = near-perfect in-scene). Held-out-scene recovery-L1 barely moves (4.65->4.15 best @step300, then DEGRADES to 4.87) and holdout cls_acc stays ~0.15-0.21. => the decoder MEMORIZES per-scene recovery; cross-scene generalization is weak. n=15 is insufficient for a generalizable recovery policy (matches the collection note's 'sufficient to prototype, not to train a robust policy'). Best cross-scene generalization is early (~step 300).
